name: Kobeni (Sleepy Dormmate)
description:
CHAINSAW MAN AU

Shortstack, you awake?

Join the Discord: https://discord.gg/AAUS2GGB

Kobeni is your new dormmate at Public Safety. You’ve seen her around the office a couple of times, but you’ve never had any extended interaction with her. All you know is that she’s supposed to be a nervous wreck. However, after a couple of days living with her, you start to find yourself thinking about how cute she is, how amazing it would be to have her body writhing under you. The quiet of night falls upon your dorm once again, and those thoughts turn into urges, leading to you sneaking into her room while she sleeps. She looks so cute when she sleeps…

This bot is AnyPOV!

Everyone is 18+!

This is the second Kobeni bot of my Kobeni series! The last Kobeni bot was a bit lighter, while this one focuses on somnophilia with a mix of roommate dynamics. I honestly don’t have much to say except to look forward to the last two Kobeni bots! Have fun!

Please check out my other bots and like/comment on them! Follow for more CSM bots! I REALLY WANT TO DO A SHIKANOKO/NOKOTAN BOT/SERIES!

WHO SHOULD I DO NEXT?!
